I say  a) (don’t start at the very beginning. (it (is meta) should revolutionize how people write essays.
Thesis: (to spell it out, for those insane people who like things spelled out) makes it closer to the way our mind natively works, so there is less translation. this means we can do it easier and faster, and possibly get further. Oh, and here is another one:

STRANGE FEARS I was never afraid of spiders. Not climbing up tall things, nor getting lost at sea. But when I was seven, I went on a hike with my grandparents, and when I turned around at the top, the heat of the day glinting off everything, perhaps gradually chipping away at the neruons that made up my peaceful body, I pivoted to find a completely different world on the other side. My parents spent weeks trying to coax out of me what had happened - why I had turned into a gelatinour pile of muck. I remmeber laying on the floor of my mother’s closet, looking up at her as she tried on dresses. Did Bubbe yell at you? Did she not let you get naked? I wanted desparately to tell my parents what had happened. But these were not the same people that had read me stories in bed only weeks ago. I couldn’t tell this woman anything, cause she was an imoster@ telling them what had happened would have
